calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2021 Continued To Feb-09-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-20-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Anthony Ferriero's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats the above findings and a separate proposed consent judgment.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
